metadata.description: Empanada contains segmentation models for mitochondria, nuclei, and lipid droplets in EM images.

authors.name: Ryan Conrad
authors.affiliation: Center for Molecular Microscopy, Center for Cancer Research, National Cancer Institute, National Institutes of Health, Bethesda, MD 20892, USA

authors.name: Kedar Narayan
authors.affiliation: Center for Molecular Microscopy, Center for Cancer Research, National Cancer Institute, National Institutes of Health, Bethesda, MD 20892, USA

pubs.title: Instance segmentation of mitochondria in electron microscopy images with a generalist deep learning model trained on a diverse dataset
pubs.info: Main paper that describes model & data

params.name: Plane
params.tooltip: Whether to use all planes (XY, XZ, YZ) or a single plane

params.name: Downsampling
params.tooltip: Downsampling factor for the input image

params.name: Maximum objects
params.tooltip: Maximum number of objects to segment per class

params.name: Semantic only
params.tooltip: Only run semantic segmentation for all classes

params.name: Fill holes
params.tooltip: Whether to fill holes in the segmentation masks

params.name: Median Filter Size
params.tooltip: Number of image slices over which to apply a median filter to semantic segmentation probabilities. Only applies to 3D/'All'.

params.name: Erode labels (px; 3D)
params.tooltip: Will erode objects in the masks by specified number of pixels before final consensus. Only applies to 3D/'All'.

params.name: Dilate labels (px; 3D)
params.tooltip: Will dilate objects in the masks by specified number of pixels before final consensus. Only applies to 3D/'All'.

params.name: Voxel Vote
params.tooltip: Number of stacks from ortho-plane inference in which a voxel must be labelled in order to end up in the consensus segmentation. Only applies to 3D/'All'.

params.name: Allow single-plane objects
params.tooltip: Whether to allow objects that are only segmented in a single plane (XY, XZ, or YZ) to be included in the final consensus segmentation. Only applies to 3D/'All'.
